browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Vegetation, Net/Gross Primary Production
collectionDescription: Provides information about the Net Primary Production, the net amount of carbon assimilated after subtracting the autotrophic respiration from GPP. Every 10-days, estimates are available at global scale, at a spatial resolution of ~300 m. More information here.

layers.longDescription: Net Primary Production represents the net amount of carbon assimilated after subtracting the autotrophic respiration from GPP. It is expressed in g C/m²/day.
